metadata.title: Verify email | Slashie
metadata.description: Verify your email address to finish securing your Slashie account.

en.loadingDescription: Hang tight while we confirm your link.
en.invalidDescription: This verification link is missing or malformed. Open the link from your email, or request a new one.
en.errorDescription: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

metadata.title: 驗證電郵 | Slashie
metadata.description: 驗證你的電郵地址，以完成保護 Slashie 帳戶。

zh_hk.loadingDescription: 請稍候，我們正在確認你的連結。
zh_hk.invalidDescription: 此驗證連結遺失或格式不正確。請開啟電郵中的連結，或重新索取。
zh_hk.errorDescription: 此驗證連結無效或已過期。
